items.name: Mindra
items.tagline: Agent Teams You Can Actually Delegate To
items.description: Mindra is the command center for your non-sleeping, 24/7 awake agentic team. Explain your task, and Mindra will create the best agentic team for you. Automate your marketing, supply chain and more. With Mindra's built-in governance, human oversight, and support for your existing stack, you can finally trust your agents.

items.name: Codex Pets
items.tagline: Animated companions for your Codex workflow
items.description: Codex Pets are optional animated companions for Codex. They live in a floating overlay, show active thread status, reflect whether Codex is running, waiting, or ready for review, and can be customized through the hatch-pet skill.

items.name: Aaavatar
items.tagline: Branded team headshots in one drop
items.description: Drop one or more profile photos into Aaavatar. Backgrounds is removed, colors balanced, missing pieces restored in one click, everyone aligned, and exported in every format you need. Built for HR and design teams maintaining a branded team gallery.

items.name: Flowly
items.tagline: Your personal AI assistant, native to your desktop
items.description: Flowly is a native AI assistant that takes action across your apps and browser tabs. Summon it as a full chat, from the menubar, or through a notch overlay — one global hotkey away on macOS, Windows, and Linux. Since our January launch we shipped a browser agent, voice coach, and end-to-end encryption — your chats stay yours, even from us. Free forever — Pro plan for unlimited usage.

items.name: Claude Code & Codex Usage Trading Cards by Rudel
items.tagline: Get your trading card based on your CC & codex usage
items.description: Rudel now turns your Claude Code & Codex sessions into a trading card with an archetype based on your pattern. Based on session shape, token usage, model mix, repo breadth, cost intensity, output signals, errors, and patterns. Free, open source, and self-hostable.

items.name: Dropy
items.tagline: Track prices on stores like Amazon, eBay, & AliExpress
items.description: Dropy helps you save money by tracking prices on thousands of online stores like Amazon, eBay, and AliExpress. Get instant notifications when prices drop, view historical price charts, and make smarter purchasing decisions. Stop overpaying and start saving with Dropy!

items.name: Visitor profiles and timeline by Croct
items.tagline: Uncover the story behind every click to optimize your site
items.description: Track events, leverage profile attributes, and seamlessly connect anonymous to identified data the moment a user logs in. Dive deeper into individual, chronological timelines to see the exact pages they browsed and actions they took. Spot live visitors in real-time, explore optimization insights, and easily segment audiences to fuel AB tests and build highly personalized website experiences that convert better.

items.name: Regulus by Cumbuca
items.tagline: AI chatbot trained on Brazil's Central Bank regulations
items.description: Generic AI hallucinate on Brazilian financial regulation. Lawyers are expensive. The rules change constantly. Regulus is an AI chatbot trained exclusively on official Central Bank normatives — Open Finance and Pix regulations, technical docs, and message catalogs. Ask regulatory questions in natural language, get answers with references to original sources. Built by Cumbuca, a licensed Payment Institution in Brazil. Free to use

items.name: Sleek Analytics for iOS
items.tagline: Your website analytics in your pocket
items.description: Sleek Analytics is a privacy-first Google Analytics alternative for Modern Web. Real-time website analytics, cookieless tracking, and fast dashboards.

items.name: Panels Store
items.tagline: Buy DRM-free comics and read them instantly in Panels
items.description: Panels Store is a DRM-free digital comics marketplace built by the team behind Panels, the iOS and Mac comic reader used by hundreds of thousands of readers. Readers can discover, buy, download, and read comics without platform lock-in. Creators and publishers keep 80%, stay non-exclusive, and get access to an audience already reading comics every day.
